query: Microsoft fiscal year 2025 annual revenue total results
answer: Microsoft's fiscal year 2025 annual revenue was $305.453 billion, up 16.67% year-over-year, driven by strong cloud service growth. The Intelligent Cloud segment, led by Azure, saw a 39% increase in revenue. Full-year revenue guidance reflects sustained enterprise demand for AI and infrastructure services.

results.title: MLQ.ai | AI for investors
results.snippet: * Microsoft reported Q4 fiscal 2025 revenue of $76.4 billion, up 18% year-over-year and ahead of expectations.[5][6]. * Azure and other cloud services revenue grew 39% in the quarter, driven by core infrastructure demand.[5][6]. The results were propelled by growth in cloud services, with Azure up 39% and Microsoft Cloud revenue reaching $46.7 billion.[5][6]. Intelligent Cloud revenue reached $29.9 billion, up 26%, driven by Azure's accelerated core infrastructure business. Microsoft Cloud revenue grew to $46.7 billion, up 27% or 25% in constant currency, with gross margin at 68%. Microsoft's Q4 results underscore the dominance of its Intelligent Cloud segment, where Azure's 39% growth reflects sustained enterprise demand for AI and infrastructure services despite acknowledged capacity limits. Full-year guidance will hinge on efficiency gains offsetting AI capex, with focus on core infrastructure from large customers.[5][6] Broader transformation across workloads, as emphasized by CEO Nadella, positions Microsoft to capture AI-driven business shifts, supported by $281.7 billion in FY2025 revenue as a base.
